# Integration Test: Simple Feature

## Feature: Task List Component

Add a simple task list component to the application.

## Requirements
1. Display a list of tasks
2. Each task shows title and completion status
3. Clicking a task toggles completion
4. Add button to create new task with title input

## Tech Stack
- TypeScript / React
- Existing component library

## Assumptions
- React environment is configured
- No backend required (local state only)

## Test Expectations
This plan is designed for integration testing:
- No risky assumptions (skip spike)
- Small scope (3-5 tasks)
- Clear verification criteria
- Should complete in < 2 minutes
